info.name: Telegram Assistant Bot
info.description: API collection for the Telegram Assistant Bot — a NestJS application powered by Claude Sonnet 4.6. The bot itself operates over the Telegram Bot API, but this collection covers the two HTTP endpoints exposed by the server: a health check and the Google OAuth 2.0 callback.

variable.description: Base URL of the running bot server. Change to your production domain when deployed.

item.name: Health
item.description: Liveness and readiness checks. Used by Docker, load balancers, and monitoring tools.

request.description:
Returns the current health status of the application, including PostgreSQL and Redis connectivity and server uptime.

**200 OK** — all services healthy.
**503 Service Unavailable** — one or more services are degraded.

item.name: Google OAuth
item.description: Google OAuth 2.0 flow. The authorization URL is generated by the bot when a user runs `/connect` in Telegram. Google then redirects the user's browser to the callback endpoint below.

query.description: Authorization code returned by Google. Provided automatically when Google redirects back after user consent.
CSRF state token generated per-user and stored in Redis for 10 minutes. Must match the value issued during the authorization URL generation.
Set by Google when the user denies access (e.g. error=access_denied). Mutually exclusive with code.

request.description:
Google redirects to this endpoint after the user completes the consent screen.

The server will:
1. Validate the `state` parameter against Redis (10-minute TTL)
2. Exchange the `code` for OAuth tokens
3. Fetch the user's email from Google
4. Encrypt and store tokens in PostgreSQL (AES-256-GCM)
5. Send a confirmation message to the user in Telegram
6. Return an HTML confirmation page

**Note:** This endpoint is not meant to be called manually. It is the redirect target for Google's OAuth flow initiated from Telegram via `/connect`.

response.name: Success — Google account connected
response.body:
✅ Google account connected!

You can close this tab and return to Telegram.

response.name: Error — User denied access
response.body:
❌ Authorization denied

You declined the Google authorization. You can try again in Telegram with /connect.

response.name: Error — State expired or invalid
response.body:
❌ Connection failed

OAuth state not found or expired. Please start the connection again.
